name: Image Upload UI
summary: Frontend image upload component with preview, drag-and-drop, and paste support
goals: Provide intuitive image upload with preview and multiple input methods
Support drag-and-drop, clipboard paste, and file picker

specDetail.description: An ImagePreview component combined with useImageInput hook that provides image upload functionality. Supports drag-and-drop, clipboard paste (Ctrl+V), and file picker. Shows image previews before sending.

parameters.name: images
parameters.description: Array of uploaded images with preview data

parameters.name: onImageAdd
parameters.description: Callback when a new image is added

parameters.name: onImageRemove
parameters.description: Callback when an image is removed by index

parameters.name: maxImages
parameters.description: Maximum number of images per message (default 5)

constraints: Must accept PNG, JPG, GIF, and WebP formats only
Must enforce maximum image size of 10MB per image
Must show upload progress for large images

acceptanceCriteria.when: the user pastes an image from clipboard
acceptanceCriteria.then: a preview of the image appears in the input area ready to send

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
